known_contradictions.claim_a: Pugh is comfortable with media attention and handles controversy with grace
known_contradictions.claim_b: In long-form interviews, she describes anxiety about public perception and describes shutting down during the Don't Worry Darling press cycle
known_contradictions.sources: Late-night appearances vs. Off Menu podcast

known_contradictions.claim_a: Her physical transformation for roles shows dedication and range
known_contradictions.claim_b: Every physical change has been within her existing body type — no fundamental transformation has been attempted
